chapter_title.en: When his men showed impatience on his delay in giving them permission to fight in Siffin

text: ومن كلام له (عليه السلام) وقد استبطأ أصحابه إذنه لهم في القتال بصفين

en.sayed-ali-raza: When Amīr al-mu’minīn’s men showed impatience on his delay in giving them permission to fight in Ṣiffīn, he said:
